channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kisumu Guardian Appeals for Help After Form Four Student Goes Missing Over Health Concerns
item.description: In Kisumu, a Form Four student from Kisumu Day High School, Michael Onyango, has gone missing, leaving his guardian, Wilfrida Atieno, distraught. Onyango had been unwell the previous week and had not ...

item.title: Trump-backed Ed Gallrein defeats incumbent Thomas Massie in Kentucky Republican primary
item.description: In a notable test of former U.S. President Donald Trump's continuing influence over the Republican Party, Trump-endorsed candidate Ed Gallrein defeated incumbent Representative Thomas Massie in the Ke...

item.title: Family Speaks Out After Kakamega Student Shot During Protests
item.description: The family of 22-year-old Derrick Peter Machanje, a student at Sigalagala National Polytechnic and part-time tuk-tuk driver, has broken their silence following his tragic death during Monday’s anti-fu...

item.title: Earring thief struck by truck along EDSA Balintawak
item.description: In a recent incident along EDSA Balintawak, a man who reportedly snatched earrings from a pedestrian was struck by a passing truck. The event was captured on CCTV and has since circulated on social me...

item.title: Drowning Pool Cancel South American Tour Citing Logistical Challenges
item.description: Drowning Pool have announced the cancellation of their South American tour, originally scheduled to run from May 20 in Bogota, Colombia to May 31 in Coritiba, Brazil. Tour organisers cited low ticket ...

item.title: Former Leaders Urge Nigerians to Preserve History as Gowon Releases Autobiography
item.description: For Abuja on Tuesday, former President Goodluck Jonathan, the Sultan of Sokoto, His Eminence Sa’ad Abubakar, and other top leaders gather for the public launch of former Head of State Yakubu Gowon’s a...

item.title: Street Life in 1950s New York City Through Nick DeWolf’s Photography
item.description: The article explores New York City in the late 1950s through the lens of American photographer Nick DeWolf. During this era, the city was a dynamic blend of modernity and grit, with bustling streets f...

item.title: Cadiz City Youth Graduates Top 10 in PMA, Surpassing Father's Military Rank
item.description: Mark Clement Centina, a 24-year-old from Cadiz City, Negros Occidental, has graduated with honors from the Philippine Military Academy (PMA) Talang Dangal Class of 2026, ranking 10th out of 207 cadets...

item.title: Andrea Del Rosario explains old photo with Bato Dela Rosa shared for meme trends
item.description: Actress and public figure Andrea Del Rosario recently addressed social media attention regarding a photo featuring her with former PNP Chief Bato Dela Rosa. In a clarification post, Del Rosario emphas...

item.title: Marcos sees potential global economic benefits from US-China dialogue
item.description: Philippine President Ferdinand “Bongbong” Marcos Jr. expressed optimism over the recent meeting between US President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping. In an interview with Japanese media ...

item.title: Tems, Wizkid, Burna Boy and Asake Earn Nominations for 2026 BET Awards
item.description: Naija music don dey shine for international stage as big artistes like Wizkid, Tems, Burna Boy and Asake don get nominations for the 2026 BET Awards. The award people announce the nominations on Tuesd...

item.title: Nigerian Stars Tems, Wizkid, Burna Boy, and Asake Land BET Awards 2026 Nominations
item.description: Naija music dey shine for the 2026 BET Awards as big names like Tems, Wizkid, Burna Boy, and Asake don secure nominations. Tems lead the Naija artistes with three nominations: Best Female R&B/Pop Arti...

item.title: Barangay tanod injured in shooting incident while buying food, vendor also hurt
item.description: In a recent incident in Dasmariñas, Cavite, a barangay tanod (local community watchman) was shot while purchasing food. Unfortunately, a nearby vendor also got caught in the crossfire and sustained in...

item.title: Jonathan Andic Detained Amid Investigation into Father Isak Andic's Death
item.description: Jonathan Andic, 45, the son of Mango founder Isak Andic, has been arrested by Catalan police in connection with his father's death. Isak Andic, 71, passed away in December 2024 after falling from a ra...

item.title: New Zealand moves to criminalise non-consensual sexual deepfakes and considers regulating apps
item.description: New Zealand is set to introduce the Deepfake Digital Harm and Exploitation Bill, which will criminalise the creation, distribution, or sale of sexualised deepfakes without consent. The move responds t...

item.title: DPWH officials removed after cyclist dies from road collapse in Benguet
item.description: MANILA, Philippines — Two officials from the Department of Public Works and Highways (DPWH) in the Cordillera region, Isagani Cayme and Marjory Banao, have been relieved of their duties following the ...

item.title: How Sedentary Lifestyle Affects Men's Health
item.description: The article dey show wetin fit happen if man just siddon down too much and no dey move. E start with story of Chris, 47, wey dey struggle small to even stand from sofa because him body don dey weak fr...

item.title: Trump Signals Potential Military Action Against Iran Amid Nuclear Dispute
item.description: US President Donald Trump has revealed that a planned military strike on Iran was postponed at the last minute, claiming the attack was only 'an hour away'. He stated that US warships are fully prepar...

item.title: Ambira Boys High School Closed Indefinitely Following Student Unrest Over Exam Cheating Claims
item.description: Ambira Boys High School in Siaya County was closed indefinitely after students staged a violent রাত rampage on the night of May 18, causing widespread destruction of school property worth millions of ...

item.title: Arsenal secure first Premier League title in 22 years following Man City draw
item.description: Arsenal have been crowned Premier League champions for the first time in 22 years, ending a long wait since their Invincibles season in 2004. Mikel Arteta's side had been runners-up in the previous th...
